meta.title: How the US Air Force could take on Godzilla and WIN
meta.description:
In honor of April Fool's Day, we decided to have a bit of fun and explore the ways the United States Air Force could defeat a Kaiju (or giant monster) similar to Godzilla, without even needing support from the other military branches. 

Of course, in the canon of these films, military hardware never quite does the trick, but here in the real world... It's tough to deny the destructive power wielded by the US Air Force. 

This is, of course, all in good fun. Happy April Fool's Day, everyone!
